---
title: "2.0_Final_Project_Code"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-16"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
#INSURANCE
#Import data
df <- read.csv("~/Downloads/insurance.csv")

df$sex <- as.factor(df$sex)
df$smoker <- as.factor(df$smoker)
df$region <- as.factor(df$region)

boxplot(charges ~ smoker, data = df, las =2 )

plot(df$age, df$charges, main = "Age vs. Charges", xlab = "Age", ylab = "Charges")

#SMOKER AND AGE
colors <- ifelse(df$smoker == "yes", "red", "purple")

plot(df$age, df$charges, 
     col = colors, pch = 16,
     main = "Insurance Charges by Age and Smoking Status",
     xlab = "Age", ylab = "Charges ($)")

# Add a Legend
legend("topleft", 
       legend = c("Smoker", "Non-Smoker"), 
       col = c("red", "purple"), 
       pch = 16, )

```



```{r}

```


```{r}

```


```{r}

```
